$comment: c36 D-CSUBSET-MUTABLE-POINTER-TO-CONST: a `const int *p` walks an array via `p++` (the sqlite zFormat+=4 / zDate++ shape). The const qualifies the POINTEE, not the pointer OBJECT, so advancing `p` is legal. RED-ON-DISABLE: pre-c36 the coarse whole-decl const scan marked `p` const → `p++` was a spurious S_ConstViolation → this would not COMPILE; compile is the pin, exit 42 confirms the walk derefs the right slots. Uses int (32-bit) ops only (sub-32-bit ALU is a separate deferred gap) and p++ (NOT binary p+n, whose element stride is separately flagged). Release pipeline + all 4 targets.
